CREATE TABLE test_strings (s1 VARCHAR(100), len INT, s2 VARCHAR(10));
SELECT lpad(s1, len, s2) FROM test_strings WHERE len >= LENGTH(s1);
SELECT lpad(s1, len, s2) AS padded FROM test_strings WHERE s1 = 'abc';
SELECT s1, len, lpad(s1, len, s2) AS padded FROM test_strings ORDER BY LENGTH(padded);
SELECT DISTINCT lpad(s1, len, s2) FROM test_strings WHERE s1 LIKE 'a%';
SELECT a.s1, b.s2, lpad(a.s1, a.len, b.s2) FROM test_strings a JOIN test_strings b ON a.len = b.len WHERE a.len < 10;
SELECT CASE WHEN LENGTH(lpad(s1, len, s2)) > len THEN 'Truncated' ELSE 'Padded' END AS result FROM test_strings;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(lpad(s1, len, s2)) <= len;
